## Salvage resolution

The autonomous orchestrator dispatch and its retry both failed with malformed TASK packets (missing top-level `dispatch_id` / `author` / `timestamp` / `status` fields — planner under-specified for the no-tool-spawn case, not a scope-guard or heading-depth issue). Per the repo's salvage rule, hand-authored the docs-only PREFLIGHT directly.

- **Branch:** [`ai-dispatch/ISSUE-224.salvage`](https://github.com/RustCADs/RGE/tree/ai-dispatch/ISSUE-224.salvage)
- **Commit:** [`eb4f403`](https://github.com/RustCADs/RGE/commit/eb4f403) — `ai-dispatch ISSUE-224: salvage rge-editor scene-loader integration preflight`
- **Diff:** 1 file changed, 47 insertions, 0 deletions; only `plans/BASELINE.md` modified
- **Gate:** `git diff --check` clean; no source / test / Cargo / lint / ADR / workflow / automation / scheduler / task brief / `Status.md` / `HANDOFF.md` / `change.md` / packet edits

### What was appended

One new H2 section `## rge-editor → rge-scene-loader --scene <path> integration preflight (Phase 9)` after the egui-host preflight at end-of-file. The section:

- Cites ISSUE-219's `substrate_prerequisite_triggered` verdict explicitly.
- Documents the current gap: `Cli::glb_path` only (`editor/rge-editor/src/main.rs:107`); no `scene_path` field; no `--scene` parser arm; no `load_scene_into_world` call site; no `rge-scene-loader` / `rge-data` dep in `editor/rge-editor/Cargo.toml`. Notes that `--scene` does appear at `editor/rge-editor/src/main.rs:143` but only as a future-flags comment placeholder.
- Names `runtime/runtime-headless/src/main.rs` as the validated reference call shape to mirror.
- Notes that the simple-scene golden project has no `BRepHandle`, so a first wiring would be **constructor-level / headless validation only** — `render_init` no-ops and `render_frame` returns false when no CAD scene or prebuilt mesh exists.
- Scopes a 5-step future implementation dispatch (do not implement here).
- Explicitly defers `CadCheckpoint`, `MenuRegistry`, hierarchy panel, Save `.rge-scene`, and workspace selection, each with reason.
- Includes `rg`-based verification commands for parser/call-site gaps and the reference call shape.

### Branch policy

Salvage branch is **not** merged to `main` and will not be auto-merged. The two failed automation branches (`ai-dispatch/ISSUE-224` and `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-224.attempt1`) are left intact for forensics. Closing this issue as positive salvage.
